calendar.matters:
AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2009 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA (SAN FRANCISCO) AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - Heard in conjunction with Case #468703

Judge John G. Schwartz, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Reporter Carol Haraburda CSR #8052. (525)

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff Janet Pickens In Propria Persona.
John P. Devine of the California Attorney General appearing on behalf of the defendants.

This matter comes on calendar for hearing on the defendants' Demurrers to the First Amended Complaint. No argument is given, both sides submit on the paperwork. The court sustains the demurrers without leave to amend. The orders are signed in open court.
